description: Model backend configuration. Posture: Claude-only playtest (2026-06-05). Ollama is disabled; Mock is INSTANTIATED for test contexts but gated out of the live chain at runtime by WES_REQUIRE_REAL_LLM=1.
_2026-06-05_posture_change: User direction: Anthropic-only for playtest + tuning. Production playtest MUST set WES_REQUIRE_REAL_LLM=1 (which strips mock from the chain at generate-time). Tests run without that flag and use the Fixture Registry / MockBackend templates. Every BackendManager.generate() call is logged via world_system/living_world/backends/llm_dev_log.py to llm_debug_logs/wes_<session>.jsonl.
_playtest_checklist: 2. Set WES_REQUIRE_REAL_LLM=1 — strips mock from the chain so a canned template can't masquerade as real output
3. Set WES_DISABLE_FIXTURES=1 if you want to bypass the LLM Fixture Registry (otherwise pre-canned fixtures still resolve before the backend is called)
4. Optional: WES_VERBOSE=1 streams pipeline events to stdout in addition to the dev log
5. Run python tools/wes_real_llm_smoketest.py before playtest to verify the chain

_model_choices_rationale._note: Per-role model assignment rationale. Adjust task_routing entries below to override.
_model_choices_rationale.all_tasks: claude (Sonnet 4). Single-model posture eliminates per-task model variance. Cost-aware tuning happens via temperature/top_p, not by routing to a cheaper local model.

ollama.description: DISABLED 2026-06-05 — Claude-only posture. Re-enable here if a future playtest needs local fallback.

claude.description: Anthropic Claude API — the sole live backend during playtest.

mock.description: Enabled for tests + fixture resolution. WES_REQUIRE_REAL_LLM=1 strips mock from the live chain at generate-time so a canned template never masquerades as real output during playtest.

crafting.description: Item generation from crafting — uses existing llm_item_generator flow

faction_dialogue.description: NPC dialogue enhanced with faction affinity context

wms_layer2.description: WMS Layer 2: one-sentence factual narrations from evaluator triggers

wms_layer3.description: WMS Layer 3: cross-domain consolidation across districts

wns_layer2.description: WNS NL2 locality weaver (v1.0 model assignment)

wns_layer5.description: WNS NL5 province weaver — claude default (province-scale tides need broader synthesis); ollama on cloud failure (v1.0)

wns_layer6.description: WNS NL6 nation weaver — claude default (nation-scale arcs benefit from larger context); ollama on cloud failure (v1.0)

wns_layer7.description: WNS NL7 world embroiderer — claude default (civilizational pulse needs the broadest synthesis); ollama fallback (v1.0)

wes_execution_planner.description: WES Tier 1 planner — cloud tolerated (§5.2); Ollama local on escalation (v1.0 model assignment)

wes_hub_nodes.description: WES Tier 2 hub — resource nodes dispatcher (v1.0)

wes_hub_skills.description: WES Tier 2 hub — skills dispatcher (no tag invention) (v1.0)

wes_hub_chunks.description: WES Tier 2 hub — chunks (biome templates) dispatcher (v1.0)

wes_hub_npcs.description: WES Tier 2 hub — NPC dispatcher; home_chunk drives cultural tone (v1.0)

wes_hub_quests.description: WES Tier 2 hub — quest dispatcher (rewards_prose only) (v1.0)

wes_tool_hostiles.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — hostile JSON generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_materials.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — material JSON generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_nodes.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — resource-node JSON generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_skills.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — skill JSON generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_titles.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — title JSON generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_chunks.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — chunk template (biome) generator (v1.0)

wes_tool_npcs.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — NPC v3 generator. Claude default — inline personality + speechbank + cultural phrase_bank benefit from richer synthesis. Ollama fallback for offline (v1.0)

wes_tool_quests.description: WES Tier 3 executor_tool — quest v3 generator. Claude default — narrative reward prose + completion_dialogue need quest-giver voice fidelity (v1.0)

wes_quest_reward_pregen.description: Quest reward materializer — turns rewards_prose into concrete QuestRewards + completion_dialogue at quest accept time. Voice fidelity matters for the dialogue, so claude default; ollama on cloud failure.

wes_quest_reward_adapt.description: Quest reward adapter — adjusts pre-generated rewards at turn-in based on play context (time taken, urgency). Numerical/bounded task; smaller model viable.

_fallback_chain_note: §15 backend hardening 2026-06-05: claude first, mock as test-only fallback. WES_REQUIRE_REAL_LLM=1 strips 'mock' from the chain at generate-time so production playtest never silently degrades. Ollama is omitted because it's disabled.

ollama.description: Local model — higher concurrency, lower cooldown
